title: rubus lobayensis
intro: Rubus lobayensis, also known as Lobaye raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Central Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, including diarrhea and dysentery. The health benefits of Rubus lobayensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Rubus lobayensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
